name: R-S Bellco
description_short: R-S Bellco FCU is a member-owned federal credit union offering auto loans, mortgages, savings accounts, and convenient shared branching access to 5,000+ credit union locations nationwide.
description_long:
R-S Bellco Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution operating as a federal credit union under NCUA insurance. The organization provides traditional credit union services including deposit accounts, lending products, and digital banking solutions to its membership base.

The credit union offers a diverse product suite: auto loans (4.25% APR), motorcycle loans (6.74% APR), RV/boat loans (7.24% APR), home equity loans (5.25% APR), home equity lines of credit (5.00% APR promotional rate), and mortgage products. On the savings side, they provide IRA accounts (2.00% APY), 12-month CDs (3.45% APY), and high-yield savings accounts. Members also have access to a VISA card and mobile check deposit functionality through their mobile app.

R-S Bellco distinguishes itself through its participation in the CO-OP Shared Branch network, enabling members to conduct transactions at over 5,000 participating credit union locations nationwide without traveling to their primary branch. This reciprocal arrangement is a defining feature of credit unions and provides genuine geographic convenience. The institution also offers free mobile banking with online enrollment, mobile deposit capabilities, and fraud department support services.

As a traditional credit union, R-S Bellco is best suited for consumers seeking membership-based financial services with competitive rates and branch network convenience. However, prospective members should note that credit union membership requirements and approval processes may apply, and their online presence suggests a regional rather than national footprint. The institution appears operationally stable but information about specific membership eligibility criteria is not readily available on their website.
services: Mobile banking and online account access
pros: Access to 5,000+ shared branching locations nationwide through CO-OP network at no cost
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.25% APR
Mobile check deposit feature integrated into mobile app
Free mobile banking and online account enrollment
Home equity line of credit promotional rate of 5.00% APR
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure with NCUA insurance protection
VISA card and diverse loan products (auto, motorcycle, RV, home equity, mortgages)
cons: High-yield savings account rate of only 0.10% APY is significantly below market rates at online banks
Limited online information about membership eligibility requirements and application process
No stated presence in all 50 states; appears to be regional credit union with limited branch footprint outside service area
New shared branching identity verification requirement as of May 1, 2025 may create friction for out-of-state members
best_for: Members seeking competitive auto and motorcycle loan rates with flexible repayment options
Credit union members who travel frequently and need access to branch services nationwide via shared branching
Homeowners interested in home equity loans and lines of credit with promotional rates
Consumers who value member-owned, not-for-profit financial institutions
diagnosis: R-S Bellco FCU is best for credit union members in their service area seeking competitive loan rates, convenient nationwide branch access through CO-OP shared branching, and member-owned financial services. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted based on geographic location or employer affiliation, and their savings account rates lag significantly behind competing online institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: R-S Bellco — Credit Union in New Brighton, PA | CreditDoc
meta_description: R-S Bellco — NCUA-insured credit union in New Brighton, PA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
